use_cases: Audio volume control in media players and video players
Mute/unmute toggle for video conferencing applications
Volume adjustment in music streaming interfaces
Speaker settings in dashboard or settings panels
Accessibility controls for audio output levels
ai_summary: A vertical volume slider component with an integrated mute toggle button. Features a speaker SVG icon that changes between muted and unmuted states, with smooth hover transitions. Includes state management to remember previous volume levels when toggling mute, and automatically handles edge cases like volume reaching zero.
